ab: maha nanu kayan sawni?
en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: masakinut kayan yu, kapayux manabuw siya kilux.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: maha nanu kayan sawni?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: makilux kayan yu, kapayux manabuw siya.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: maha nanu kayan ti tanux?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: rahu witux niya, lungiy ku tasasi su kilux ki.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: maha nanu kayan ti tanux?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: payux yulung niya, ungat witux ku babaw kayan.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: pakusa nanu kayan sasan?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: musa ungat witux sasan, payux yulung ru rahu ku bayhuy.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: maha nanu kayan riyax kasa?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: masakinut riyax hani, palukus su zibun mahatuw su tanux.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: musa maha nanu kayan hangi’an riyax?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: balay kayan ku hangi’an riyax.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: musa mawalax kayan riyax kasa?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: balay kayan ku riyax kasa, ayat pawalax.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: musa mawalax kayan riyax kasa?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: huw, pawalax riyax kasa.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: niya mawalax misu sawni aw?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: masiwat la, niya mahatu ku witux la.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: niya mawalax misu sawni?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: mawalax la, ini kung aras su tabakuy.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: niya mawalax ti tanux?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: ini walax misu sawni la, babaw kinriyax la ga musa mawalax, mahatu su tanux ga aras su tabakuy.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: babaw utux kayan ga musa sakinut ku amisan aw?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: huw, babaw utux kayan amisan ga musa sakinut, kapayux malukus su latan.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: misu kayan i abagan hani ga musa makilux aw?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: hu, musa makilux ku abagan, kapayux manabuw su siya.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: balay su kayan tamangaw abaw aw?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: sagalan mu kayan tamangaw abaw, mali ku kayan niya.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: sagalan su kayan masahu abaw aw?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: ini mu sagaliy kayan masahu abaw, mutu payux rahuyan niya.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
